overview.description: The Direxion Daily 7-10 Year Treasury Bull 3X ETF (TYD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE BofA US Treasury (7-10 Y) index. The fund provides daily 3x exposure to a market-value weighted index of U.S. Treasury bonds with remaining maturities between 7 and 10 years. TYD was launched on Apr 16, 2009 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Final Trades: QQQ, TDY, GM & MCD
data.text: The final trades of the week. With CNBC's Melissa Lee and the Fast Money traders, Steve Grasso, Tim Seymour, Brian Kelly and Julie Biel.
